hooks.command: p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in *src/ui/app.js|*src/ui/style.css) echo 'src/ui/app.js and src/ui/style.css are generated artifacts. Edit src/ui/*.tsx or src/ui/input.css and run npm run build:ui (or invoke the dashboard-rebuild skill).' >&2; exit 2;; esac
p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in *.rs) cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings 2>&1 | head -40;; *.tsx|*.ts) ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -40;; esac
